commands.test_subset: cargo test -p opengoose-types -p opengoose-profiles -p opengoose-persistence -p opengoose-projects
commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. opengoose-web fails with v8 download error. sccache must be disabled (RUSTC_WRAPPER='') in sandbox.

testing_notes.note: PR #324 merged (persistence: 291→293 with count_runs_by_status tests from Perf Improver PR #329). Projects: 27→29 after this run's PR (absolute context-file path + tilde cwd). sccache not installed - must use RUSTC_WRAPPER='' for local builds.

completed_work.description: Task 3: 2 tests added to opengoose-projects: project_context_loads_file_by_absolute_path (absolute path branch in from_definition) and resolve_cwd_with_tilde_prefix (tilde expansion in resolve_cwd). PR submitted on branch test-assist/projects-path-coverage-2026-03-17.
completed_work.pr_note: PR pending - branch pushed, awaiting PR number

completed_work.description: Task 4: PR #324 merged by soilSpoon on 2026-03-16. Tests: persistence=293, Perf Improver PR #329 added count_runs_by_status tests.

Task 3: 2 migration test improvements in opengoose-persistence: added api_keys to table existence test, added test_performance_indexes_exist covering 5 named indexes. PR #324 submitted (merged 2026-03-16).
Task 3: 4 tests added to opengoose-profiles covering empty extension name, empty/whitespace provider_fallback goose_provider and goose_model, empty parameter key. PR #322 merged on 2026-03-15.

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic. Maintainer added dispatch.rs (OPE-533) and matrix incoming (OPE-536) tests — good momentum.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: Offline testable crates are well-covered - 512 tests total. Focus future runs on finding opportunities in network-dependent crates or wait for new features.
